scripts.check:docs: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const docs=[{file:'README.md',needles:['# LLM Translator MVP','## Start Here','## Repo Layout']},{file:'docs/setup.md',needles:['# Setup','targetLang','Obsidian:','Browser:']},{file:'docs/mvp-manual-smoke-test.md',needles:['# MVP Manual Smoke Test','Translating...','## Smoke-test pass criteria']}];const missing=[];for(const doc of docs){if(!fs.existsSync(doc.file)){missing.push(doc.file+': missing');continue;}const content=fs.readFileSync(doc.file,'utf8');if(!content.trim()){missing.push(doc.file+': empty');continue;}for(const needle of doc.needles){if(!content.includes(needle)){missing.push(doc.file+': missing "'+needle+'"');}}}if(missing.length){console.error('Docs validation failed:');for(const item of missing) console.error(item);process.exit(1);}"
scripts.build: npm run -w @llm-translator/core build && npm run -w @llm-translator/browser-extension build && npm run -w @llm-translator/obsidian-plugin build
scripts.test: npm run -w @llm-translator/core build && npm run -w @llm-translator/core test && npm run -w @llm-translator/browser-extension build && npm run -w @llm-translator/browser-extension test && npm run -w @llm-translator/obsidian-plugin build && npm run -w @llm-translator/obsidian-plugin test
